update.author: Corie Welch and the Amazing Dicey Dudes

description.p: The Arditi is a heavy weapons fighter clad in heavy armor laying down supportive fire for their allies.

sheet.description: The Arditi is a heavy weapons fighter clad in heavy armor laying down supportive fire for their allies.

description.p: When you choose this archetype at 3rd level, you may use your strength modifier instead of your dexterity modifier when making attacks with medium or heavy firearms.

sheet.description: You may use your strength modifier instead of your dexterity modifier when making attacks with medium or heavy firearms.

description.p: Starting at 3rd level, as a bonus action, you may make an additional attack with a Medium or Heavy firearm with the Auto property. The multiplication die of the attack will be 1 regardless of roll.

sheet.description: As a bonus action, you may make an additional attack with a Medium or Heavy firearm with the Auto property. The multiplication die of the attack will be 1 regardless of roll.

description.p: Starting at 7th level, when you successfully make an attack with a medium or heavy firearm with the Auto property, you may decide the roll of the multiplication die. You may do this a number of times equal to your proficiency modifier per long or short rest.

sheet.description: When you successfully make an attack with a medium or heavy firearm with the Auto property, you may decide the roll of the multiplication die. You may do this {{throttle:times}} per long or short rest.

description.p: Starting at 7th level, you gain +1 AC when wearing heavy armor.

sheet.description: You gain +1 AC when wearing heavy armor.

description.p: Starting at 10th level, if you're wearing heavy armor and an enemy’s ranged weapon attack against you misses, choose one enemy within 5 feet of you. The attacker must roll the damage for their missed attack against you, and deal half damage to the new target instead.

sheet.description: If you're wearing heavy armor and an enemy’s ranged weapon attack against you misses, choose one enemy within 5 feet of you. The attacker must roll the damage for their missed attack against you, and deal half damage to the new target instead.

description.p: Starting at 15th level, as a bonus action, you gain resistance to all non-magical damage for the next minute.

sheet.description: As a bonus action, you gain resistance to all non-magical damage for the next minute.
